{{Quote|I went to one of the Meetings out in deepspace, halfway from the Pits of Plooma to the Galactic Rim. All I cared about was sneaking in under the Ithorians' detection screens, handing off about a hundred kilos of rock ivory to Grambo the Worrt and getting out of there before the Imperials caught up with me, and it was still the most… I dunno. "Impressive" isn't the right word.|[[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]], recalling a smuggling mission to Revyia|<ref name="CotJ">[[Children of the Jedi (novel)|''Children of the Jedi'']]</ref>}}
'''Revyia''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Veragi sector/Legends|Veragi sector]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]], and the [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of the [[Revwien/Legends|Revwien]] [[Species/Legends|species]].

==Description==
Revyia was a world on the outer fringes of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]],<ref name="GG12" /> and was situated in the [[Veragi sector/Legends|Veragi sector]],<ref name="TEAOC" /> halfway between the [[Pits of Plooma/Legends|Pits of Plooma]] and the [[Galactic Rim/Legends|Galactic Rim]].<ref name="CotJ" /><ref name="Unstated Canon">{{Blog|danwallace|153|Unstated Canon in Star Wars: The Essential Atlas}}</ref> The planet had [[Jungle/Legends|jungles]], lakes, and rivers, and had groves in its wild lands. The [[urpine]] was a species of [[Diet/Legends|carnivorous]] animal, known to fend off herds of marauding herbivores.<ref name="GG12" />

==History==
Revyia was the [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of the [[Revwien/Legends|Revwien]] [[Species/Legends|species]]. Their history, recorded through seemingly contradictory myths and legends, told tales of great and powerful [[City/Legends|cities]] dominated by powerful artifacts, though [[Archaeologist/Legends|archaeologists]] were unable to uncover evidence of a technological society in Revwien pre-history. The species lived in groves in the planet's wilds, with some groups keeping carnivorous animals as pets to fend off herbivores that could threaten the population. The world's major communities were an infrequent stop for several independent [[Freighter/Legends|freighters]], though Revwiens typically didn't prize material possessions and had little to offer as trade goods.<ref name="GG12" />

In [[30 BBY/Legends|30 BBY]], the [[Tyia]] [[The Force/Legends|Force]] tradition was brought to the planet by a missionary aboard an independent [[Freighter/Legends|freighter]].<ref name="GG12" />

Prior to joining the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]], [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] attended an [[Ithorian/Legends|Ithorian]] [[Herd Meet/Legends|Herd Meet]] in deep space near Revyia in order to [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggle]] approximately one hundred kilograms of [[rock ivory]] to [[Grambo]] the Worrt.<ref name="CotJ" /><ref name="Unstated Canon" />

{{Planet-stub}}
